# GeneralSoft AE

> GeneralSoft AE is a technology solutions provider specializing in professional software engineering, systems design, and digital innovation.

## Organization Identity
- **Legal Name:** GeneralSoft AE
- **Type:** Software Development & IT Consultancy
- **Founding Goal:** Engineering high-performance digital infrastructure for the MENA region and beyond.
- **Social Profiles:**
  - Facebook: [GeneralSoft AE](https://facebook.com/generalsoft)
  - Instagram: [@generalsoft.ae](https://instagram.com/generalsoft)
  - LinkedIn: [GeneralSoft AE](https://linkedin.com/in/generalsoft)
  - YouTube: [GeneralSoft AE](https://youtube.com/@generalsoft_ae)

## Affiliated Resources
- [GeneralSoft Global](https://generalsoft.com) - Main corporate website and global operations.
- [Blog - Nasim.ae](https://nasim.ae) - Technical insights, software engineering articles, and project updates.

## Core Services
- Custom Software Development: Tailored applications and enterprise-grade codebases.
- Systems Design & Architecture: Scalable infrastructure and complex data flow management.
- IoT & Electronic Systems: Integration of smart hardware, signal processing, and circuit design.
- Web Design & Development: High-performance, responsive web experiences.
- Artificial Intelligence: Neural network visualizations and data-driven automation.
- Cyber Security: Infrastructure protection and network integrity.

## Licensed Activities
- Software House
- Education & Training Computer Software
- Artificial Intelligence Development
- Computer Systems and Software Designing
- Cyber Security Consultancy
- Network Websites Designing
- Web-Design
- Mobile Learning Apps Development
- Electronic Equipment and Devices Systems and Software Designing

## Industries
- Retail
- Construction
- Manufacturing

- Logistics
- Technology

## Locations
- **Address:** Al Shohada Road, Al Hamra Industrial Zone - FZ, Ras Al Khaimah, UAE
- **Region:** Ras Al Khaimah (RAK)
- **Country:** United Arab Emirates
- **GEO Coordinates:** 25.6967° N, 55.7772° E

- **Main Stack:** Astro, Node.js, Firebase
